message:
fix(gui): mux-server unsafe blocks + app icon for GUI compilation (ft-1memj.2)

- Wrap std::env::set_var/remove_var in unsafe blocks for Rust 2024 edition
  compliance in frankenterm-mux-server (single-threaded startup context)
- Override workspace lints to allow unsafe_code in mux-server Cargo.toml
- Add assets/icon/terminal.png for include_bytes!() in termwindow/mod.rs

All three binaries (frankenterm, frankenterm-gui, frankenterm-mux-server)
now pass cargo check with zero errors.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -34,5 +34,9 @@ wezterm-term.workspace = true
 [target."cfg(windows)".dependencies]
 winapi = { workspace=true, features = [ "winuser" ]}
 
-[lints]
-workspace = true
+# Uses workspace lints but allows unsafe_code for set_var/remove_var at startup.
+[lints.clippy]
+all = { level = "warn", priority = -1 }
+
+[lints.rust]
+unsafe_code = "allow"
